cover:
A clean, modern, high-tech comparison infographic illustrating "MULTI-AGENT WORKFLOWS IN PRODUCTION: What Actually Works vs What Looks Good in Demos".
Overall Layout: A split vertical column layout comparing the old way on the left and the new way on the right, divided by a subtle gradient vertical divider in the center.

Header:
- At the top, a bold, clean sans-serif headline: "MULTI-AGENT WORKFLOWS IN PRODUCTION" in deep navy blue.
- Directly beneath, a smaller subtitle in dark gray: "What Actually Works vs What Looks Good in Demos".

Left Column (❌ AGENT SWARM — Demo Pattern):
- Header: "❌ AGENT SWARM — Demo Pattern" in a clear bold blue-gray box.
- Colors: Soft reddish and greyish pastel accents to denote complexity/inefficiency.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "Agents talk to each other freely" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "State is hidden and hard to inspect" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Responsibility is impossible to assign" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Failures cannot be replayed or rolled back" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "No audit trail for compliance" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Looks impressive, ships badly" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A central technical flow diagram showing tangled colored lines (representing complexity) between blocks, labeled with the most relevant components.

Right Column (✓ ORCHESTRATED WORKFLOW — Production):
- Header: "✓ ORCHESTRATED WORKFLOW — Production" in a clean bold bright blue box.
- Colors: Soft green and bright blue vector elements to represent efficiency, speed, and order.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "One orchestrator owns all workflow state" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Each agent: typed input, typed output, confidence score" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Confidence gates trigger human review automatically" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Agents propose actions — deterministic service commits" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Full audit log before any DML write" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Boring by design. Trusted in production." describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A central technical diagram showing a beautiful, glowing central geometric node labeled "Single Source of Truth", with clean, straight, organized blue lines connected directly to key blocks.
  - A flat vector speedometer graphic labeled "FAST" with the needle pointing to the green zone.

Style Details: Clean vector illustration style, modern SaaS interface aesthetic, professional layout, flat design, high-quality typography, crisp lines, bright and professional tech color palette (deep navy, teal, bright blue, soft red, soft green, on a light blue-grey background), perfectly sharp rendering, zero text noise or spelling errors.
images:
A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "SEPARATE THINKING FROM ACTING".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "SEPARATE THINKING FROM ACTING".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "Agents Propose. Deterministic Services Commit. Always." with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "Idempotency Key" with a key icon, "Confidence Gate" with a filter icon, "Apex Owns DML" with a lock icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "AGENT ACTS DIRECTLY — Production Disaster". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "AGENT PROPOSES — APEX COMMITS SAFELY". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // Agent calls Salesforce directly (dangerous)
const agent = new SalesforceAgent()
await agent.updateCase(caseId, {
  Status: 'Closed', Priority: 'Low'
})
// No idempotency check. No confidence gate.
// No audit. Duplicate runs = duplicate writes.
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    // Proposal + deterministic Apex commit layer
type SalesforceUpdateProposal = {
  caseId: string
  fields: { Status?: string; Priority?: string }
  idempotencyKey: string    // AI_Action_Log__c
  requiresApproval: boolean // routes to human
}
// Apex: confidence >= 0.85 AND key not exists

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "Agent returns SalesforceUpdateProposal — never writes directly", "Apex checks AI_Action_Log__c for idempotency key first", "Confidence < 0.85 → human review queue, no auto-commit", "FOR UPDATE row lock on Case before every write", "Log run ID, proposal fields, confidence, and outcome".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "Proposals Only", "Apex Commits", "Idempotency Keys", "Audit Trail" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.
